content.claim: Hungary's elite selective schools concentrate top performers among already-advantaged backgrounds: 14% of top readers come from advantaged families versus 1% from deprived backgrounds, compared to OECD averages of 17% and 3% respectively.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Education finance lens
limitations: Single PISA cycle year not specified in notes
Does not establish whether this pattern is caused by 6/8-year tracks specifically or broader system sorting
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
